description: Returns a group object based on ID or name.
examples:
Command Example
!tn-get-group name=`linux machines`
Context Example
{
"Tanium.Group": {
"Deleted": false,
"ID": 11721,
"Name": "linux machines",

!tn-get-group name=`linux machines`
Context Example
{
"Tanium.Group": {
"Deleted": false,
"ID": 11721,
"Name": "linux machines",
"Text": " OS Platform equals linux",
name: tn-get-group

outputs.description: The unique ID of the group object. Tanium.Group.Name The name of the group.
outputs.name: Tanium.Group.ID

outputs.description: A description of the clients that this group represents. Tanium.Group.Type The type of the group.
outputs.name: Tanium.Group.Text

outputs.description: Whether the group is deleted. True if deleted.
outputs.name: Tanium.Group.Deleted
